items.raw_desc: Társasjáték Jungo:                Combine and discard cards firstJungo is a card game that's perfect for a quick game with family or friends. Your task will be to get rid of all the cards from your hand. Players are dealt a certain number of cards at the start, but the important rule is that they must not rearrange them in any way. The cards have a number from 1 to 8 or a pair of numbers on them. The player on the turn can play a card or set of cards to beat the one currently on the table. He can take the earned stitch or throw it away. If the player cannot or will not fold, he draws a card from the deck. The first to get rid of the cards wins. Jungo delights with its interesting design and is suitable for up to 5 players aged 10 and up. items.raw_desc: Étrend-kiegészítő GymBeam Alfa-liponsav, 90 kapszula:GymBeam Alfa-liponsav90 kapszulaAlfa-liponsav - egy hatóanyag, amely számos reakcióban vesz részt a szervezetben. Az alfa-liponsav, más néven ALA, természetesen előfordul a szervezetünkben, különösen a mitokondriumokban. Ezek energiát termelnek a szervezetünk szükségleteihez, de antioxidáns folyamatok is zajlanak bennük.
